duplicateDetection: Use sha1 from each manifest entry. Future imports should skip exact sha1 matches and merge usableBy/source metadata instead of copying duplicate files.
notes: Webzen Bloodangel Mastery images are intentionally duplicated by item name when the source guide reuses the same image across classes.
Guia MU Online item objects include list stats, usable classes, image metadata and raw/detail tables for future wiki rendering.
